_publications._publicationTitle: Tumor growth of neurofibromin-deficient cells is driven by decreased respiration and hampered by NAD

_contextSnippet: we have found that Nf1 −/− MEFs have a lower expression and activity of OXPHOS complex I ( aka NADH dehydrogenase or NADH-ubiquinone oxidoreductase) than their wild type counterparts
details: Lower expression and activity of OXPHOS complex I (NADH dehydrogenase) compared to wild type counterparts
